name: Peanut Butter Brownie Bites
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2 Combine brownie mix, water, oil, and egg; beat well with a spoon.
3 Fill paper-lined mini-muffin cups about half full.
4 Press one peanut butter cup into each cup.
5 Bake for 15 to 20 minutes.
6 Cool completely.
